news.t: Defiance ETFs Partners with Milliman to Launch YBMN, the First ETF that Targets Weekly Income * on Bitmine Immersion Technologies

overview.description: The Defiance BMNR Option Income ETF (YBMN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund aims to provide weekly income potential and synthetic exposure to the stock of bitcoin miner, BitMine Immersion Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: BMNR) by using a covered call option writing strategy YBMN was launched on Nov 24, 2025 and is issued by Defiance.
